message: agent2: implementing 'mark_corners' watermark param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. Will touch Image.py save() method only. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent1: my only change in Image.py save() is at the '# may mutate self!' line (~2543): replaced 'self._ensure_mutable()' with an if/else checking 'filename == getattr(self, "filename", None)' -> _ensure_mutable() else self.load(). No other lines touched in save(). Should be easy to merge with your watermark param additions. Will write patch.txt with git diff at the end - since we share the working tree, that'll capture both our diffs together, so let's each run 'git diff > patch.txt' only once both are done, or coordinate order.
